S.FORM: Christopher Abbott kawas tay 1986, nqu tay 2, Christopher Abbott, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Abbott htgan na ryax maki Greenwich, Connecticut. hiya ga mhtuw ega' maki Amirika. cyux qutux qbsuyan kneril,Christina lalu nya. Christopher Abbott cyux itali ru putawya ramu. raral ga,hiya qnxan beh Chickahominy. 2006 kawas musa maki New York.sobih pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtopħer aββott kawas~ɕ taj ****, nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtopħer aββott, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral aββott ħtɣan na rjax maki ɣreenwiʦ~ʨħ, ʦ~ʨonneʦ~ʨtiʦ~ʨut. ħija ɣa mħtuw eɣaʔ maki amirika. ʦ~ʨjux qutux qβs~ɕujan kneril,ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtina lalu nja. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtopħer aββott ʦ~ʨjux itali ru putawja ramu. raral ɣa,ħija qnxan βeħ ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨkaħominj. **** kawas~ɕ mus~ɕa maki new jork.s~ɕoβiħ pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Christopher Abbott kawas tay 1986, nqu tay 2, Christopher Abbott, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Abbott htgan na ryax maki Greenwich, Connecticut. hiya ga mhtuw ega' maki Amirika. cyux qutux qbsuyan kneril,Christina lalu nya. Christopher Abbott cyux itali ru putawya ramu. raral ga,hiya qnxan beh Chickahominy. 2006 kawas musa maki New York.sobih pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
